title: Chemocompetent Cells of Vibrio natriegens Preparation
author: Tobias Hensel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pt9dnr6
materials: All subsequent steps are performed at room temperature!
Thow an aliquot of chemocompetent Vn (Weinstock)
Plate out on LB with 2.5% NaCl

steps.title: 150mL BHI + v2 salts 1,5mL...
steps.instruction: 150mL BHI + v2 salts 1,5mL storage buffer 35mL MgCl 2 [100mM] 30mL CaCl 2 [100mM] 15mL MnCl 2 [555mM] 15mL KCL [1M] 15mL PIPES [100mM] 120µL spec. DMSO

steps.title: Brain heart infusion (BHI) + v2...
steps.instruction: Brain heart infusion (BHI) + v2 salts 37g/L brain heart infusion broth 204mM NaCl 4.2mM KCl 23.14mM MgCl 2 Storage buffer 55mM MnCl 2 15 mM CaCl 2 250mM KCl 10mM PIPES 7% spec. DMSO

steps.title: Grow at 30°C shaking with agitation at 200 r
steps.instruction: Grow at 30°C shaking with agitation at 200 r.p.m. to an OD 600 of 0.4

steps.title: 150 mL of BHI + v2...
steps.instruction: 150 mL of BHI + v2 salts is inoculated directly from a glycerol stock of V. natriegens and incubated in an Erlenmeyer flask at 30°C with agitation at 200 r.p.m..

steps.title: The culture is split into three...
steps.instruction: The culture is split into three 50 mL cronical tubes and the cells are pelleted by centrifugation at 3000 x g for 5 min.

steps.title: The supernatant is carefully removed and...
steps.instruction: The supernatant is carefully removed and each pellet is gently suspended with 5 mL MgCl 2 [100mM].

steps.title: The three cronical tubes are consolidated...
steps.instruction: The three cronical tubes are consolidated into one 50 mL cronical tube.

steps.title: Cells are pelleted by centrifugation at...
steps.instruction: Cells are pelleted by centrifugation at 3000 x g for 5 min.

steps.title: The supernatant is carefully removed and...
steps.instruction: The supernatant is carefully removed and the pellet is gently suspended with 20 mL MgCl 2 [100mM].

steps.title: The cells are pelleted again by...
steps.instruction: The cells are pelleted again by centrifugation at 3000 x g for 4 min.

steps.title: The supernatant is carefully removed and...
steps.instruction: The supernatant is carefully removed and the pellet is gently suspended with 30 mL CaCl 2 [100mM] and then incubated at room temperature for 40 min.

steps.title: Following the incubation, cells are pelleted...
steps.instruction: Following the incubation, cells are pelleted by centrifugation at 3000 x g for 4 min.

steps.title: The supernatant is carefully removed and...
steps.instruction: The supernatant is carefully removed and the cells are resuspended in 1.5 mL transformation storage buffer.

steps.title: The cells are then aliquoted into...
steps.instruction: The cells are then aliquoted into chilled tubes, frozen in a liquid nitrogen bath and stored at -80°C until use.

steps.title: Inoculate 1 µL pYTK into an...
steps.instruction: Inoculate 1 µL pYTK into an aliquot of chemocompetent Vn (Weinstock)
